tree.name: AJ Johnson
tree.tradeDescription: DAL traded Anthony Davis, D'Angelo Russell, Jaden Hardy, and Dante Exum to WAS for Khris Middleton, AJ Johnson, Malaki Branham, Marvin Bagley III, OKC 2026 1st, GSW 2030 1st (top-20 protected), and three 2nd round picks
tree.note: Illawarra guard, 2024 #23 overall pick by Milwaukee

assetsGivenUp.name: Anthony Davis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: DAL traded Luka Doncic, Maxi Kleber, and Markieff Morris to LAL. DAL received Anthony Davis, Max Christie, and LAL 2029 1st. Utah also involved.
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky forward, 2012 #1 pick by New Orleans

assetsGivenUp.name: Luka Doncic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: ATL traded #3 pick (Luka Doncic) to DAL for #5 pick (Trae Young) and a protected 2019 1st round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Real Madrid guard, drafted #3 by Atlanta, traded to Dallas on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 1st Round Pick (#5)
assetsGivenUp.note: DAL's own #5 pick, traded to ATL on draft night for Luka Doncic (#3). Became Trae Young.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#10) via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Protected first-round pick sent to Atlanta, became #10 overall

assetsGivenUp.name: Maxi Kleber
assetsGivenUp.note: German forward, signed as international free agent from Brose Bamberg

assetsGivenUp.name: Markieff Morris
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward, signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.note: Ohio State guard, 2015 #2 pick by Los Angeles Lakers. Signed 2yr/$12M deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaden Hardy
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DAL traded 2024 2nd round pick and 2028 2nd round pick to SAC for Jaden Hardy
assetsGivenUp.note: G League Ignite guard, drafted #37 by Sacramento, traded to Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#54) via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas own 2024 2nd round pick sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas own 2028 2nd round pick sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: Dante Exum
assetsGivenUp.note: Australian guard, 2014 #5 pick by Utah. Signed by Dallas as free agent.
